extraction.one_line_summary: BUITRAGO Santiago attacked solo on the final climb Salita del Menador with 8km to go, caught and dropped FUNDERPLOL, held off LEMARER by 25 seconds.
tactical_patterns: FUNDERPLOL attacked 65km out with two HC climbs remaining, cyclocross background enabling multi-hour solo attack before being caught.
BUITRAGO recovered from crash at 80km to go, rejoined 25-rider break, then soloed final climb showing unusual resilience.
BAHRAIN VICTORIOUS paced GC group despite having ALMEIDA showing weakness, unusual team tactic when protecting struggling leader.

rider_signals.BUITRAGO Santiago: positive: 22yo showed remarkable recovery to win after crash at 80km, ability to respond after multi-hour breakaway selections
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: negative: showed first signs of weakness when Bahrain paced on Salita del Menador, lost nearly a minute to podium trio
rider_signals.FUNDERPLOL Mathieu: positive: sustained 65km solo/small group effort over two HC climbs before being caught, cyclocross pedigree enables audacious long-range moves
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: dropped by CARAPAZ attack despite being in select group, lost 7 seconds to podium duo revealing gap to top two
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: lost additional time beyond Almeida group, fifth place increasingly under threat
